title: Better equality comparison for values of Dynamic data type
bug_features_seed: INSERT INTO test_dynamic VALUES (CAST(42 AS UNSIGNED)), (NULL), (JSON_ARRAY(1, 2, 3)), (CAST(3.14 AS DECIMAL(10, 2)));

key_bug_features: Dynamic type equality comparison with incompatible types
